title: Iran hits Kuwait desalination plant, strikes Syria for first time
gist: This Al-Monitor 'Middle East Minute' podcast page carries almost no body text beyond player metadata; the only substantive content is that Iraqi Prime Minister Ali al-Zaidi is seeking to attract major investment via a US-Iraq business forum.

insights.claim: Iraqi Prime Minister Ali al-Zaidi is seeking to attract major foreign investment through a US-Iraq business forum.
insights.speaker: Al-Monitor
insights.so_what: A US-Iraq business forum signals Baghdad actively courting Western capital even amid regional Iran-linked conflict, worth tracking for deal announcements.
insights.quote: Iraqi Prime Minister Ali al-Zaidi hopes to attract major investment during a US-Iraq business forum.
insights.locator: Iraqi Prime Minister Ali al-Zaidi hopes to attract major investment
